content.en:
After a long time, Ye Tian completed the transformation and stabilized the realm.

At this time, Ye Tian was already a true Realm Legendary Lord, although in the realm, there was still a gap between him and those top Realm Legendary Lords, let alone the Transcendence Realm Legendary Lords, but he had narrowed the gap with them.

Other than that.

Ye Tian's true strength is already comparable to the top Realm Legendary Lord, second only to the Transcendental Realm Legendary Lord.

However, the Grey Mist and Fire Sea had even stopped several half-step Legendary Realm Lords, and it was still very difficult to pass this level.

But if he used the cultivation of the Realm Realm Legendary Lord to break through the sea of gray mist and fire, the reward he received would be very amazing.

At this time, there was a half-step Legendary Realm leader who broke through the sea of gray mist and fire, and Ye Tian could just observe it.

"One One Seven" This half-step Legendary Realm Lord is the Wumeng Lord of the True Saintless Land, and his reputation is slightly weaker than that of the Frostless Lord, and now it seems that his strength should be much worse, but he is still a half-step Legendary Realm Lord, far surpassing Ye Tian's existence.

But these levels in the Gray Mist Stone Statue are sometimes not strong enough to break through, for example, Ye Tian's strength is not as good as the Transcendence Realm Legendary Lord, and he came here, and some of the Transcendence Realm Legendary Lords have not yet broken through the Gray Mist

Therefore, strength is only a part, and the foundation is perfect and there are no defects, which is the key to easily passing the level.

Rumble!!!!

Lord Umon stepped into the sea of gray mist and fire, and the endless power of flame invaded the inside of Lord Ummon's body, incinerating his body.

Ye Tian saw it clearly, the flame power was not a real flame, the flame was a special power inside, this power could disintegrate the Eternal Force, if the physical body was not strong enough, the Eternal Force would be disintegrated, and the physical body would collapse directly.

Soon, Lord Umon walked to the sea of gray mist and fire, but there were also a slight cracks in his body, which were difficult to repair, but the problem was not too big.

After another moment, Lord Umon finally reached the end of the sea of gray mist and fire, but the cracks on his body were already dense.

However, Lord Umon eventually walked through the sea of gray mist and fire.

Subsequently, several other half-step Legendary Realm Lords also tried to cross the sea of gray mist and fire, and they all broke through at the cost of serious injuries.

After all, these half-step Legendary Realm Lords are just a little short of breaking through, and they have been perfecting their bodies all these years, if they can't pass it, it proves that their talent is too spicy.

However, if they can become a half-step Legendary Realm Lord, they will not have the talent for spicy chickens, so it is inevitable that they will pass through the sea of gray mist and fire.

As these half-step Legendary Realm Lords passed through the Grey Mist and Fire Sea, the only ones left were the Transcendental Realm Lords and a few Realm Legendary Lords present.

The sea of gray mist and fire is not like the long river of gray mist, it is difficult to get out if you go in, so Ye Tian is ready to give it a try.

After all, no matter how much you observe others through the sea of gray fog and fire, it is not as profound as the insight you have from your own experiments.

Wow!

Ye Tian stepped into the sea of gray mist and fire, endless flames poured into his body, no matter how he defended, it was useless, even the gray mist battle armor was useless in the face of such a force invasion.

This power is aimed at the body itself, and no defense or treasure can stop it.

Of course, if the strength is strong enough, such as the Legendary Lord of the Legendary Realm, he may be able to block these flames.

Soon, Ye Tian withdrew from the sea of gray mist and fire

After this personal test and his previous observation of several half-step Legendary Realm Lords crossing the Grey Mist and Fire Sea, Ye Tian had a general understanding of some of the situation in the Grey Mist and Fire Sea.

The Grey Mist and Fire Sea tests the basic strength of the body, for example, if the same Transcendental Legendary Lord, the body looks the same, and the Eternal Force looks the same, but some Transcendental Legendary Lords have a stronger physical foundation, because the eternal particles formed after the fusion of will, body, and innate eternal rules are different, if the eternal particles in the body of a transcendent Realm Legendary Lord are not strong, it is easy to be disintegrated by the Grey Mist and Fire Sea, resulting in the collapse of the body.

At this time, no matter how strong you are, it is useless.

And just now, Ye Tian felt that his body was about to collapse, and the eternal particles in his body as a whole were not too strong.

Maybe he has cultivated to reach the Transcendent Realm Legendary Lord, and he can cross the Gray Mist and Fire Sea, but now he is only a Realm Realm Legendary Lord, so he can't cross the Gray Mist and Fire Sea, but he can hold on to the Gray Mist and Fire Sea for a few breaths........

"I want to impact from the Realm Legendary Lord to the Transcendent Realm Legendary Lord, I'm afraid it will take a long time.The birth of the Gray Mist Stone Statue is not permanent for people to cultivate here.At that time, even if the hundred lives of the Gray Mist Stone Statue forcibly do not leave, they will be forcibly kicked out by the Gray Mist Stone Statue, so I can't wait until the day I break through the Transcendent Realm Legendary Lord, I must change my eternal particle structure, only this path will work!@叶天心想道.

It's difficult to change the structure of its own eternal particles.

Because of the Legendary Lord of the Realm Realm, his own body was completely fused with his will and innate eternal rules, forming a new eternal body, the eternal force spread all over the body, and the eternal particles were also completely stabilized, and it was difficult to change the structure of the body.

However, it is not impossible to change, otherwise the meaning of this level would not exist.

Most Legendary Lords can only make partial changes, such as changing the arrangement of the Eternal Particles inside their bodies, but when they reach the Realm Legendary Lord Realm, the arrangement of the Eternal Particles in their bodies is almost perfect, and it is not very helpful to change them to the most perfect degree.

This is also the reason why many Transcendental Realm Legendary Lords have been stopped and don't know what to do.

If you want to completely change this situation, you can only completely change the eternal particle structure of the body, and the consequences of 0.9 are very serious, if you are not careful, the body will completely collapse and fall directly, just like the situation in the sea of gray fog and fire.

But once it succeeds, it will directly usher in a real transformation of strength, and the body will become extremely strong, and even the power of the sea of gray mist and fire will be difficult to shake.

Others didn't dare to take the second step, but Ye Tian dared to go.

"Then let's test it with other replica bodies!"

Ye Tian decided.

Subsequently, he began to experiment with replicating his body, changing his particle structure at the root, and combining them into the most perfect particle structure, rather than random combination, otherwise there was no point in changing the structure.

It can only be changed for the better, not for the worse.

And so, 300,000 eternal years have passed by 100 million _
